Class RadialSpread

java.lang.Object
simulation.services.RadialSpread
All Implemented Interfaces:
SpreadAlgorithm
public class RadialSpread extends Object implements SpreadAlgorithm
Fire-spread algorithm that considers all cells within a circular radius R.

Each candidate cell is included with a probability of 1/distance², simulating embers or sparks that travel farther with decreasing likelihood:

  • distance 1 → 100 % included
  • distance √2 → 50 %
  • distance 2 → 25 %
  • distance 3 → 11 %

Note: getNeighbours(Cell, Grid) applies the stochastic filter so that the geometry and the probability model stay together. SpreadAlgorithm.getCandidates(Cell, Grid) then additionally filters on Cell.canIgnite().

  • Constructor Details

    • RadialSpread

      public RadialSpread()
      Creates a radial algorithm with the default radius.

      public RadialSpread(int radius)
      Creates a radial algorithm with a custom radius.
      Parameters:
      radius - maximum spread distance in cells (> 0)

  • Method Details

    • getNeighbours

      public List<Cell> getNeighbours(Cell cell, Grid grid)
      Returns ALL geometrically reachable neighbours of cell according to this algorithm, regardless of their terrain type or fire state.

      Iterates over all cells within the bounding square [−radius, +radius]², retains those within the circular radius, and applies the 1/distance² stochastic inclusion filter.

      Specified by:
      getNeighbours in interface SpreadAlgorithm
      Parameters:
      cell - the source cell (must not be null)
      grid - the full simulation grid (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of neighbouring cells (never null, may be empty)

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Human-readable name shown in the GUI combo box.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface SpreadAlgorithm
      Returns:
      algorithm name

    • getRadius

      public int getRadius()
      Returns:
      current radius

    • setRadius

      public void setRadius(int radius)
      Changes the spread radius.
      Parameters:
      radius - new radius (> 0)
